mainEntity.name: Cost of AI visibility audit for Chicago firms?
mainEntity.text: Cost of AI visibility audit for Chicago firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: $1,500-$3,000 one-time, covering 50 queries, directory scans, E-E-A-T scoring.

suggestedAnswer.text: Chicago audits benchmark vs top firms, recommend fixes. DIY free but shallow. Pro audits include roadmaps, ROI projections. Repeat bi-annually. Value: Uncovers 80% gaps instantly.

name: Chicago AI Audit Pricing
description: $1,500-$3,000 one-time, covering 50 queries, directory scans, E-E-A-T scoring.
